name: selenium-e2e-saucedemo
description: Scripts de preparación de Allure para el proyecto Selenium E2E

scripts.report:allure:prepare: node scripts/copy-allure-history.js && node scripts/write-allure-env.js && node scripts/write-allure-executor.js && node scripts/write-allure-categories.js && node scripts/patch-allure-known-failures.js && node scripts/patch-allure-broken-to-failed.js && node scripts/patch-allure-passed-message.js
scripts.report:allure:generate: node scripts/copy-allure-history.js && node scripts/write-allure-env.js && node scripts/write-allure-executor.js && node scripts/write-allure-categories.js && node scripts/patch-allure-known-failures.js && node scripts/patch-allure-broken-to-failed.js && node scripts/patch-allure-passed-message.js && mvn allure:report -q && node scripts/patch-allure-selenium-logo.js
scripts.report:allure: npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:allure:open
